suite.name: CURA LOG001

kw.name: Run Keywords
Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: description=Login สำเร็จด้วยข้อมูลที่ถูกต้อง

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจากไม่กรอกทั้ง Username และ Password

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doing' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจาก Username ไม่มีในระบบ

test.name: [Documentation]

kw.name: Local Login Template
Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Verify Login Result
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'john doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจาก Username เป็นตัวพิมพ์เล็กหมด (ตรวจสอบ Case Sensitive)

kw.name: Local Login Template

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจาก Password ผิดหรือสั้นเกินไป

kw.name: Local Login Template
Open Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
เปิดหน้าแรกและนำทางไปยังหน้า Login

kw.name: Submit Login Form
Run Keyword If
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'John Doe' into text field 'id=txt-username'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
กรอกข้อมูล Login และกดปุ่มยืนยัน

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//p[contains(@class, 'text-danger')]' contains exact text 'Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.arg: expected_error=Login failed! Please ensure the username and password are valid.
description=Login ไม่สำเร็จเนื่องจากไม่กรอก Password

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: การทดสอบระบบ CURA Healthcare Service - Login Function
